# .github

## Echo Location

GitHub workflow templates live here.

## Local Role

This folder contains CI configuration for AgentFold validation.

## Boundary

GitHub workflow templates are examples until installed and run in a configured remote repository.

## Naming Note

This folder uses `FOLDER_README.md` instead of `README.md` because `.github/README.md` can be treated as a reserved GitHub display surface. The root repository README remains `README.md`.
